query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.workspaceId, w.id AS ws_id, w.name AS ws_name, w.taxId, w.contactPhone, w.subscriptionStatus FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON u.workspaceId = w.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%ifat%' OR u.email LIKE '%spark%' ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.workspaceId, w.id AS ws_id, w.name AS ws_name, w.taxId, w.contactPhone, w.subscriptionStatus FROM users u LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON u.workspaceId = w.id WHERE u.email LIKE '%ifat%' OR u.email LIKE '%spark%' ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 10;
